highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 updates to Skia milestone m151 and ships allocation-free hot-path optimizations.
highlights_body: This release bumps the bundled Skia engine to m151 and delivers a series of zero-allocation performance fixes: pooled UTF-8 encoding in HarfBuzz, Span-based glyph result reads, and allocation-free tag parsing. SKColor gains ReadOnlySpan<char> parsing overloads and a WASM build fix lands for Blazor users.

bullets.detail: The bundled Skia engine advances to m151, bringing upstream rendering improvements, bug fixes, and performance work.
Additional cherry-picked fixes from the Skia chrome/m151 branch have been merged for improved stability.

bullets.lead: WASM build fix for SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition
bullets.detail: A Skia submodule bump removes a duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM preprocessor definition that caused WASM/Blazor build failures.

bullets.lead: SKColor hex parsing optimized with ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads
bullets.detail: SKColor.Parse and TryParse now accept ReadOnlySpan<char>, eliminating string allocations in hot-path color parsing scenarios.
The unnecessary unsafe modifier on GRContextOptions has been removed, making the type safer to use without unsafe contexts.
HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8(string) now uses a pooled UTF-8 encoder, eliminating the per-call byte[] allocation on the hot shaping path.
HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse no longer allocates a char[4] array on every call, reducing GC pressure during font feature parsing.

bullets.lead: SKShaper glyph results read via zero-copy spans
bullets.detail: SKShaper now reads glyph position and ID results via zero-copy Span access instead of array copies, reducing allocations per shaping call.
SKFourByteTag.Parse no longer allocates a char[4] array per call, matching the HarfBuzz Tag fix for consistency.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Fixed the SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition in the WASM build and added the cross-backend golden-image visual regression test harness

preview_summaries.4.151.0-p1: Preview 1 updated the bundled Skia engine to milestone m151, fixed the WASM build redefinition, and merged the first set of upstream m151 cherry-picks.

harfbuzz_summary: Eliminates per-call allocations in HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8 and HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse, reducing GC pressure on the hot text-shaping path.
